_what: arm9 head regions where a candidate build may differ from the Japanese source. Everything else must be byte-identical (or a pointer-repoint word; see gate_code_image_parity in run_static.py). Regions are FILE offsets into the decompressed arm9 image. 'forbidden' bands may never be allow-listed.
